---
name: ✨ Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature, sensor profile, or protocol support.
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Summary
A clear, one-sentence summary of the feature.

## Motivation
Why is this feature needed? What problem does it solve or what use case does it enable?

## Proposed Implementation
Describe how you think this should work. Include:
- Which repo(s) it affects (Firmware / Bridge / Sensors)
- Any API surface changes
- Hardware requirements, if any

## Alternatives Considered
What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out?

## Effort Estimate
Your rough estimate: `XS` / `S` / `M` / `L` (see [TASKS.md](../../TASKS.md) for definitions)

## Additional Context
Datasheets, reference implementations, or related projects.
